name: ptmem_view_external_body_unconstrained

proof fn phi_1_ptmem_view_external_body_unconstrained(pt1: PTMem, pt2: PTMem)
    requires
        pt1.mem !== pt2.mem,
    ensures
        pt1@ === pt2@,

}
reason: `PTMem::view` is `external_body` with no postconditions — completely unspecified, so two PTMem instances with different underlying memory could have identical PTE views

name: applied_mappings_union_prefer_right_shadows_extra
code:
proof fn phi_5_applied_mappings_union_prefer_right_shadows_extra(s: crate::os::State, base: nat, pte: PTE)
    requires
        s.extra_mappings().contains_pair(base, pte),
        s.interp_pt_mem().dom().contains(base),
    ensures
        s.applied_mappings()[base] == s.interp_pt_mem()[base],
        s.applied_mappings()[base] !== pte || pte == s.interp_pt_mem()[base],
{
}
reason: `union_prefer_right` means `interp_pt_mem` always shadows `extra_mappings` at overlapping keys — extra_mappings entries at conflicting bases are silently dropped
